query:
INSERT INTO statutes (jurisdiction, code, section, title, text_content, tags) VALUES
('CA', 'CCP', '338', 'Three Year Statute of Limitations',
 'Within three years: An action upon a liability created by statute, other than a penalty or forfeiture. An action for trespass upon or injury to real property. An action for taking, detaining, or injuring any goods or chattels, including actions for the specific recovery of personal property.',
 'civil_litigation,statute_of_limitations,three_year'),
('CA', 'CCP', '339', 'Two Year Statute of Limitations',
 'Within two years: An action upon a contract, obligation or liability not founded upon an instrument of writing. An action founded upon a contract, obligation or liability, evidenced by a certificate, or abstract or guaranty of title of real property, or by a policy of title insurance.',
 'civil_litigation,statute_of_limitations,two_year'),
('CA', 'CCP', '337', 'Four Year Statute of Limitations - Written Contract',
 'Within four years: An action upon any contract, obligation or liability founded upon an instrument in writing.',
 'civil_litigation,statute_of_limitations,contract'),
('CA', 'CCP', '340', 'One Year Statute of Limitations',
 'Within one year: An action for libel, slander, assault, battery, seduction, or for injury to or for the death of one caused by the wrongful act or neglect of another, or by a depositor against a bank for the payment of a forged or raised check, or a check that bears a forged or unauthorized endorsement.',
 'civil_litigation,statute_of_limitations,one_year'),
('CA', 'CCP', '425.16', 'Anti-SLAPP Statute',
 'A cause of action against a person arising from any act of that person in furtherance of the person''s right of petition or free speech under the United States Constitution or the California Constitution in connection with a public issue shall be subject to a special motion to strike, unless the court determines that the plaintiff has established that there is a probability that the plaintiff will prevail on the claim.',
 'civil_litigation,anti_slapp,free_speech'),
('CA', 'CCP', '998', 'Offer to Compromise',
 'Not less than 10 days prior to commencement of trial or arbitration of a dispute to be resolved by arbitration, any party may serve an offer in writing upon any other party to the action to allow judgment to be taken or an award to be entered in accordance with the terms and conditions stated at that time.',
 'civil_litigation,settlement,offer_to_compromise'),
('CA', 'CCP', '2017.010', 'Discovery Scope',
 'Unless otherwise limited by order of the court in accordance with this title, any party may obtain discovery regarding any matter, not privileged, that is relevant to the subject matter involved in the pending action or to the determination of any motion made in that action, if the matter either is itself admissible in evidence or appears reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence.',
 'civil_litigation,discovery,scope'),
('CA', 'CCP', '2025.010', 'Deposition Rules',
 'Any party may obtain discovery by taking the oral deposition of any person, including any party to the action. The person deposed may be a natural person, an organization such as a public or private corporation, a partnership, an association, or a governmental agency.',
 'civil_litigation,discovery,deposition'),
('CA', 'CCP', '2030.010', 'Interrogatories',
 'A party may propound to another party interrogatories requiring the latter to answer under oath any inquiry that relates to any matter upon which discovery may be obtained.',
 'civil_litigation,discovery,interrogatories'),
('CA', 'CCP', '2031.010', 'Demand for Production of Documents',
 'Any party may obtain discovery by inspecting, copying, testing, or sampling documents, tangible things, land or other property, and electronically stored information in the possession, custody, or control of any other party to the action.',
 'civil_litigation,discovery,document_production'),
('CA', 'CCP', '583.310', 'Five Year Rule - Dismissal',
 'An action shall be brought to trial within five years after the action is commenced against the defendant.',
 'civil_litigation,dismissal,five_year_rule'),
('CA', 'CCP', '583.420', 'Two Year Rule - Service',
 'The summons and complaint shall be served upon a defendant within three years after the action is commenced against the defendant.',
 'civil_litigation,service,three_year_rule');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2QmWxs7iH8DQva8.5d87819da4f6 --database J2wS2ZoP78AcJaejkgQxeA --execute INSERT INTO statutes (jurisdiction, code, section, title, text_content, tags) VALUES
